creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry but I need to reopen.

Same hardware etc. I just upgraded packages to 2023Q4.
I already had the LD_PRELOAD in a script to launch kodi, but now it fails with:

Xlib: extension "GLX" missing on display "unix:0:0"

Trying to launch kodi from a console with and without the environment variable doesn't make a difference.

glxinfo -B shows the same error both with and without the LD_PRELOAD library :-(
